title: Alberto Salazar An American Runner
titleZh: 阿尔贝托·萨拉查：一位美国跑者

q.en: Where was Alberto Salazar born in 1958?
q.zh: 阿尔贝托·萨拉查1958年出生在哪里？

explain.en: The book says two years after being born in Havana, Cuba, in 1958, Alberto moved with his family to the U.S.
explain.zh: 书中说萨拉查1958年生于古巴哈瓦那，两年后随家人移居美国。

q.en: In 1981, Salazar set a world record at which marathon?
q.zh: 1981年，萨拉查在哪场马拉松中创下世界纪录？

explain.en: The book says in 1981 he won the New York City Marathon in 2:08:13, setting a world record.
explain.zh: 书中说1981年他以2:08:13赢得纽约城市马拉松，创世界纪录。

q.en: The famous 1982 'Duel in the Sun' at the Boston Marathon was against whom?
q.zh: 1982年波士顿马拉松著名的'阳光下的决斗'对手是谁？

explain.en: The book describes the intense battle between Alberto Salazar and Dick Beardsley at the 1982 Boston Marathon.
explain.zh: 书中描写了1982年波士顿马拉松中萨拉查与迪克·比尔兹利之间的激烈较量。

q.en: What caused Salazar's decline after his 1982 success?
q.zh: 1982年成功后，是什么导致了萨拉查的衰落？

options.en: Overtraining until his body broke down
options.zh: 过度训练直至身体垮掉

explain.en: The book says he trained too hard (up to 200 miles a week) and his body could not keep pace, breaking down by 1990.
explain.zh: 书中说他训练过度（每周多达200英里），身体跟不上，到1990年彻底垮掉。

q.en: The marathon distance honors an ancient Greek soldier named what?
q.zh: 马拉松的距离是为了纪念一位古希腊士兵，他叫什么？

explain.en: The book says the marathon honors Pheidippides, who ran from Marathon to Athens in 490 BC with news of victory.
explain.zh: 书中说马拉松纪念菲迪皮德斯，他在公元前490年从马拉松跑到雅典传递胜利消息。

q.en: At the 1984 Summer Olympics, what place did Salazar finish in the marathon?
q.zh: 在1984年夏季奥运会上，萨拉查在马拉松中获得了第几名？

explain.en: The book says he only finished 15th in 2:14:19 at the 1984 Olympics.
explain.zh: 书中说他在1984年奥运会上仅以2:14:19获得第15名。

q.en: After recovering, which 56-mile ultra-marathon in South Africa did Salazar run?
q.zh: 康复后，萨拉查参加了南非哪场56英里的超级马拉松？

explain.en: The book says in 1994 he announced he would run the Comrades Marathon, a 56-mile test in South Africa.
explain.zh: 书中说1994年他宣布将参加南非56英里的同志马拉松。

q.en: Which high school coach inspired Alberto to transform his talent into something special?
q.zh: 哪位高中教练激励阿尔贝托将天赋转化为非凡成就？

explain.en: The book says Coach Benedetti inspired Alberto to work hard and transform his natural talent.
explain.zh: 书中说贝内代蒂教练激励阿尔贝托努力训练，将天赋转化为非凡成就。

q.en: Later in life, Salazar coached young athletes for which company?
q.zh: 晚年，萨拉查为哪家公司指导年轻运动员？

explain.en: The book says he spent years training kids and young athletes for Nike using a balanced style.
explain.zh: 书中说他多年来以更均衡的方式为耐克指导青少年运动员。

q.en: What life lesson does Salazar's story mainly teach?
q.zh: 萨拉查的故事主要传达了什么人生教训？

options.en: Listen to your body and train with balance
Always run as fast as possible

explain.en: The book shows he learned to listen to his body after overtraining ruined his health—balance matters.
explain.zh: 书中显示他在过度训练毁掉健康后学会倾听身体——均衡才是关键。

prompt.en: Salazar trained up to 200 miles a week and got injured. Do you think extreme training is worth the risk? Explain your view.
prompt.zh: 萨拉查每周训练多达200英里并最终受伤。你认为极端训练值得冒险吗？说说你的看法。

en: Think about the difference between hard work and harming your body.
Use examples from Salazar's story to support your opinion.
zh: 思考努力训练与伤害身体之间的区别。
用萨拉查故事中的例子来支持你的观点。
